notes: Three-panel /risk dashboard grounded in Yoichi's 'show me the numbers' persona. Grid collapses to 1fr under 700px. Cache banner (`cached=true`) surfaces the 30-second broker-probe TTL honestly. CTO can proceed to spec-lock.

Copy strings drafted for Sprint 2 caveat + probe-cache tooltip
